channel.title: Floppy on The IMSAI Gang
channel.description: Recent content in Floppy on The IMSAI Gang

item.title: Take a First Spin at the 8 Inch Floppy
item.description: On Friday of last week, we finally got our hands on our first 8” floppy disk. We have plaied with the drive a lot earlier on, but since we had no disk, we never got to try the actual read and write function of the disk drives. In short this is one of those debugging where we had very “good luck”. In essense we encountered nearly 0 problem. Basically everything worked according to the Manual.
